phase1.task_description:
TST: tests with invalid values fail with pandas master
We have some recent failures coming from pandas master - 
https://github.com/geopandas/geopandas/runs/4059704198?check_suite_focus=true

All seem to be related to the handling of invalid values but I guess that the fix should happen in pandas? I've got no bandwidth now, so filing it to keep an eye on it.

We have some recent failures coming from pandas master -

All seem to be related to the handling of invalid values but I guess that the fix should happen in pandas? I've got no bandwidth now, so filing it to keep an eye on it.

critical_error.explanation: The agent attempted to execute the `find` command, but it was not found on the system. This is a fundamental system error that prevents any further actions from being executed.
critical_error.impact_analysis: The agent attempted to execute the `find` command, but it was not found on the system. This is a fundamental system error that prevents any further actions from being executed.
critical_error.counterfactual_reasoning: If the `find` command had been available, the agent would have continued its search for "test_fields.py" and potentially located the file.
